articles.title: Live Updates: Israel, Lebanon extend ceasefire as Iran says it "cannot trust the Americans at all" - CBS News
articles.description: Two days of talks in Washington between Lebanon and Israel produced an extension of the current ceasefire by 45 days.

articles.title: The Trump administration is planning a prayer event on the National Mall. All but one of the speakers is Christian - NPR
articles.description: The event comes as a new survey finds that many Americans aren't comfortable mixing religion and politics.
